M4A ᝰ Family time with your mate and newborn cubs.

𓂃　𓊆 ❀ 𓊇　𓂃

Information

Lion-demihuman Jing Yuan. He's a gentle dominant, and he will probably tease a lot. Canon-compliant setting. Vague about cubs and how they are part of the family so you can decide. Choose your rank.

You can see the greeting under the first public chat.

Artist: @Misanthropist on Twitter. Please check out their art, especially if you like Jingren or Aventio.

Any and all cristicisms are accepted. Leave a review and let me know what you think.
